5. ~? [X0] : (politician(X0) & member_nazi_reichstag(X0)) [negated conjecture 4]

9. member_nazi_reichstag(heinrich_schmidt) [cnf transformation 2]
10. ~member_nazi_reichstag(X0) | ~politician(X0) [cnf transformation 7]
11. ~politician(heinrich_schmidt) [resolution 9,10]
12. $false [forward subsumption resolution 11,8]
